inaneRules.title: Main Building Lawns Prohibition
inaneRules.description: Stepping on the main-building lawns is strictly prohibited (you might get shot at sight, metaphorically speaking, or fined heavily by the security guards).

inaneRules.title: Chhat Climbing Prohibition
inaneRules.description: Climbing the famous 'chhats' (roofs) of the Badminton Court, MAC, and BioTech Department is strictly prohibited.

inaneRules.title: NSO Attendance Strictness
inaneRules.description: For some weird reason, attendance in NSO (National Sports Organisation) is taken far more seriously than in actual core lectures.

inaneRules.title: Library Sleeping Prohibition
inaneRules.description: Sleeping inside the Mahatma Gandhi Central Library (MGCL) is strictly prohibited. Security guards will wake you up.

inaneRules.title: The Pattagobhi Exam Ritual
inaneRules.description: Whether or not you are a 'ghissu' (studious student), it is an unsaid rule to share the legendary 'pattagobhi' (cabbage rolls/dish) before your mid-term and end-term exams.

inaneRules.title: IITR Confessions Warning
inaneRules.description: DO NOT VISIT the IITR Confessions page if you value your sanity and productivity.

inaneRules.title: Bitter Liquid Prohibition
inaneRules.description: Consumption of a certain particularly bitter liquid (alcohol) is strictly prohibited on campus.

acads101.grading: IIT Roorkee uses relative grading. You are graded based on your performance relative to everyone else who took the course.
acads101.backsPolicy: Most courses require a minimum attendance of 75%. If you fall below this, you get a 'back' (attendance back) and must re-register for the course.
acads101.extracurricularRequirement: It is compulsory for every first-year student to enroll in at least one activity: NCC (discipline & patriot values), NSS (community service), or NSO (sports & fitness). NSO is taken very seriously.
acads101.creditsDescription: Credits determine the weight of a course on your CGPA. For example, a 4-credit course has twice the impact on your GPA than a 2-credit course.

sparkFellowship.description: A prestigious undergraduate research program at IITR. Provides a weekly stipend and a project-funded summer internship working under IITR professors.
sparkFellowship.eligibility: Open to pre-final and sophomore students with a high CGPA.
